## Product goal
<Which club outcome does this improve — picks / meeting readiness / memory / conversation?>

## Proposed behavior
<The smallest version that delivers the value.>

## Evidence of need
<Real signal: a recurring ask, a gap members keep hitting, a weak meeting. Ground it in the corpus / club data.>

## Non-goals
<What this explicitly does not do.>

## Acceptance criteria
<How we'll know it's done and working.>

## Risks / questions
<Open questions for Jamie; fit vs. SOUL.md / PURPOSE.md / PROCESS.md; privacy.>
